name: paperclip-skills-bridge
description: Stateless HTTP bridge that exposes Paperclip skills (catalog + files, ETag passthrough, inventory allowlist) to the Hermes Agent via the .well-known/skills protocol. Companion to the paperclip-adapter-hermes-gateway adapter, deployed by the paperclip stack's install.sh.

env.name: PAPERCLIP_COMPANY_ID
env.prompt: Paperclip company UUID (set after first signup)

env.name: PAPERCLIP_API_KEY
env.prompt: Paperclip machine bearer (set after first signup)
